allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''{d[""count""]} frames available''''\)")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec radrview-server sh -c "/app/tools/realesrgan-ncnn-vulkan -i /app/tools/input.jpg -o /tmp/test_up.png -n realesrgan-x4plus -s 4 -g 0 2>&1")
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec radrview-redis redis-cli GET latest:composite)
Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec radrview-upscaler sh -c "find /data/tiles/mrms/20260320180200/12 -name '*.png' 2>/dev/null | wc -l || echo '0'")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker run --rm radrview-server sh -c "cd /tmp && apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq curl > /dev/null 2>&1 && curl -s -o dwd.tar 'https://opendata.dwd.de/weather/radar/composite/rv/composite_rv_LATEST.tar' && tar xf dwd.tar && ls composite_rv_* | head -3 && gdalinfo composite_rv_*_000-hd5 2>&1 | head -25")

Bash(MSYS_NO_PATHCONV=1 docker exec radrview-ingest-dwd sh -c "cd /tmp && apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq curl > /dev/null 2>&1 && curl -s -o dwd.tar 'https://opendata.dwd.de/weather/radar/composite/rv/composite_rv_LATEST.tar' && tar xf dwd.tar && ls *_000-hd5 | head -1 | xargs gdalinfo -stats 2>&1 | grep -i 'nodata\\|minimum\\|maximum\\|type\\|band'")
